purpose: Canonical workflow states for business/admin page generation.

flows.validation: Filters must preserve selected values while loading and show an empty state when no records match.
Dirty state must be visible before save; locked state must prevent editing without hiding submitted data.
Approval pages must show decision reason input when reject or return is selected.
Submit must not be enabled when required fields are invalid.
Reject actions require a visible reason field and confirmation copy.
Locked pages must render readonly values, not disabled invisible data.
Import result must separate accepted rows from rejected rows and expose download action for errors.
Export actions must preserve active filters and show progress when export is asynchronous.
Bulk actions require selection count, confirmation, and partial failure feedback.

global_policy: Every mutating flow must include disabled, loading, success, and error states.
State copy must come from content-standard.json.
Permission denial must use interaction-state-standard.json rather than hiding the whole workflow.
